name: Cooky‚ėÖYummy Way
desc:
1 Tuner + 1 non-Tuner monster
For this card's Synchro Summon, you can treat 1 Link-1 monster you control as a Level 1 Tuner. You can only use each of the following effects of "Cooky‚ėÖYummy Way" once per turn. If this card is Synchro Summoned: You can target up to 2 face-up monsters on the field; change them to face-down Defense Position. When your opponent activates a card or effect (Quick Effect): You can return this card to the Extra Deck; Special Summon up to 2 "Yummy" monsters from your GY.
